CONTENT.Club career: Born in Sant Cugat del Vallès, Barcelona, Catalonia, Víctor joined Girona's youth setup in 2018, from Sabadell. On 20 July 2020, before even having appeared for the reserves, he made his professional debut coming on as a second-half substitute for Jairo Izquierdo in a 0–2 Segunda División away loss against Alcorcón.On 29 August 2022, Víctor and teammate Álex Sala were loaned out to Primera Federación side Sabadell for one year. On 17 August 2023, after scoring seven goals and making six assists to help the team to stay in the third tier, he renewed his contract until 2025 and was loaned to fellow league team Barcelona Atlètic. On 24 July 2024, he joined Barcelona permanently, signing a contract until 2029.
CONTENT.Personal life: Pau Victor is the elder brother of Barcelona Juvenil B right back Guillem Víctor.
CONTENT.External links: Pau Víctor at BDFutbolPau Víctor at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)Pau Víctor at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Pau Víctor Delgado (born 26 November 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Barcelona. Mainly a striker, he can also play as a right winger.
